title: cleome hirta
intro: Cleome hirta, also known as bush clover or love flower, is a flowering plant native to Africa and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cleome hirta include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin conditions. Cleome hirta is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a tincture or dried for later use in herbal preparations.
